value.found_quote: Use `extends` when a profile is mostly the same as a built-in or another named profile. Prefer extending a built-in profile over starting from scratch so baseline protections carry forward.
value.rationale: The page describes `extends` for permission profiles, which provides profile inheritance (extending a parent profile and overriding only differing rules). The feature is described under "Beta. Permission profiles are under active development and may change."
